subcodes.title: Words spoken at 97 Cadogan Gardens in London, 1912-12-26
subcodes.first_line: Yes: In the Baha'i Cause arts, sciences and all crafts are (counted as) worship.... all effort and exertion put forth
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @work as worship, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation
